deterministic_controls.scope: Release-doctor-safe controls executed with --skip-release to avoid recursive doctor invocation.
coverage: Start Pack structure, schema parity, dependency cycles, and ordered closure
atomic seal rejection and repeated-phase or forged-history rejection
authority-bound amendments with registered approval evidence
independent-review identity, scope, revision, timestamp, and evidence controls
semantic amendment and operational checkpoint separation
artifact, invalidation, blocker, and release integrity
feedback privacy, identifier, symlink, and parent-permission controls

model_behavior_evaluation.reason: The 15 prompt cases are structurally validated declarations. No reproducible model/client runner evidence was produced for version 0.1.1.

deterministic_environment.scope: dependency-free local validators, controls, and reproducible packaging
